creator: rodrigc@crodrigues.org
text:
On Tue, May 08, 2007 at 12:30:26AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/apr,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/112506 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/112506
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Hi,

I submitted the PR, so I definitely approve it.  There seems
to be a script which prevents me from checking in changes to this
port...this did not happen before.

-- 
Craig Rodrigues        
rodrigc@crodrigues.org
